description_long: This is a stone tower with a cylindrical structure, featuring a crenellated parapet at the top reminiscent of medieval fortifications. The exterior is constructed from gray stone blocks, and the midsection is adorned with large, sculpted skull motifs that encircle the tower, giving it a menacing appearance. A stone staircase wraps around the base, leading up to a wooden platform and a prominent arched wooden door. Several tall, narrow windows are distributed around the tower, providing both light and a defensive vantage. The base of the tower is set on a rocky foundation, enhancing its imposing and fortified look.
description: A gray stone medieval-style tower with skull decorations, crenellations, a stone staircase, and wooden doors and platforms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stone staircase leading up to a wooden door, with two large skull motifs and crenellated battlements above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuation of the stone staircase, two skull motifs, and a narrow window set into the stonework.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tower with a wooden platform, a single arched window, and the skull motifs partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden platform extending from the tower, a stone staircase, and two skull motifs on the facade.
